description_long: This house features a Mediterranean-inspired design with a prominent terracotta-tiled hip roof and light stone exterior walls. The front facade includes a double garage, arched windows, and a central entryway flanked by two columns and small shrubs. Multiple rooflines and varying heights give the structure a dynamic, multi-volume appearance. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with a mix of single and paired panes. A wide driveway leads to the garage, while a paved walkway connects to the main entrance. The rear and side elevations reveal additional windows and a spacious patio area, enhancing the home's residential character.
description: A Mediterranean-style house with terracotta-tiled hip roofs, stone walls, arched windows, and a double garage. The entryway features columns and landscaping, with varied window arrangements and a spacious driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, central entryway with columns, arched windows, and the main driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the multi-level roof, numerous windows, and the extension of the driveway and patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back patio, symmetrical window arrangement, and the continuation of the stone exterior.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the garage side, additional windows, and the extended driveway.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with double columns, small steps, arched door, and decorative landscaping
